headline: Vaud state councillor Dittli under fire: investigation confirms secret deal, State Council says trust "compromised."
summary: An independent inquiry found that Valérie Dittli (Centre/PLR) concluded a secret agreement to have a criminal complaint against her dropped; the State Council presented findings in a press conference on ~1 May and concluded that trust with Dittli "is compromised and will be difficult to restore." Ce

headline: WHO pandemic-treaty PABS annex: Geneva talks end without deal; seventh IGWG set for July.
summary: The resumed sixth IGWG meeting (Geneva, 27 Apr–1 May 2026) failed to finalise the Pathogen Access and Benefit Sharing annex to the WHO Pandemic Agreement.

headline: National 142 domestic violence helpline launches.
summary: Switzerland's long-delayed three-digit emergency support line for victims of domestic and sexual violence went live on 1 May 2026, supported by a Federal Police awareness campaign.

headline: Bilaterals III in parliamentary debate; SVP sole categorical opponent.
summary: The Federal Council submitted its dispatch on the Swiss–EU stabilisation and further development package (four separate federal resolutions) to the Federal Assembly on 13 March; spring-session debate is now under way.

headline: Trump doubles down on Iran blockade, calls US Navy seizures "like pirates"; Tehran warns of "unprecedented" action.
summary: At a Florida rally on 2 May, Trump described US Navy seizures of cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz blockade as "a very profitable business," confirming the blockade continues until a nuclear deal is reached.

headline: US to pull 5,000+ troops from Germany; Trump signals deeper cuts; NATO "assessing details."
summary: The Pentagon announced on 1 May the withdrawal of one brigade combat team and associated forces (~5,000 troops) from Germany over 6–12 months, triggered by Chancellor Merz's public criticism of US Iran policy.

headline: Trump–Xi summit confirmed for 14–15 May in Beijing; Daines pre-summit delegation under way.
summary: The White House has locked in May 14–15 for a two-day summit with Xi Jinping in Beijing (trip is limited to the capital for security and schedule reasons).

headline: Oxford: first-ever "quadsqueezing" achieved with a single trapped ion.
summary: Published in _Nature Physics_ on 1 May, Oxford researchers combined two controlled forces on a trapped ion to generate a 4th-order quantum interaction — quadsqueezing — for the first time on any platform, achieved ≥100× faster than conventional approaches.

headline: Boosting astrocyte Sox9 clears Alzheimer's plaques and preserves cognition in mice.
summary: Researchers report that overexpressing the Sox9 protein in astrocytes (star-shaped brain support cells) drives phagocytic clearance of amyloid-β plaques via the MEGF10 receptor; in mouse models with established memory impairment, the approach reduced plaque load and preserved cognitive function over

headline: Cascadia–San Andreas faults may co-rupture; three historical synchronisations found.
summary: Analysis of ocean-floor sediment cores shows the Cascadia subduction zone and San Andreas fault ruptured within minutes to hours of each other at least three times in the past 1,500 years, including in 1700.

headline: 50-year gamma-Cas X-ray mystery solved by XRISM.
summary: Three-epoch XRISM observations (Dec 2024, Feb and Jun 2025) confirmed the anomalous X-rays from γ Cassiopeiae originate from its accreting magnetic white-dwarf companion, not the Be star itself; plasma velocity tracked the white dwarf's 203-day orbit, not the Be star's.

headline: [2604.19087] OLLM: Options-based Large Language Models
summary: — [preprint] Introduces latent "options" (sequences of tokens grouped into reusable sub-policies) into LLM fine-tuning; improves both token-accuracy and final-answer correctness on mathematical reasoning by constraining RL exploration to options learned in the supervised phase rather than unconstrai

headline: Asia Friday close — Japan and Australia up; China/HK closed for May Day.
summary: Nikkei 225 +0.38% to 59,513; ASX 200 +0.74% to 8,729, snapping an eight-session losing streak.

headline: EUR/CHF ~0.9233; CHF at the firm end of its recent range.
